info.title: FlowCatalyst Platform API
info.description: REST APIs for events, subscriptions, and administration

post.summary: Sync dispatch pools for an application
Sync event types for an application

parameters.name: removeUnlisted
parameters.description: Remove API-sourced event types not in list

post.summary: Sync the OpenAPI document for an application.
post.description:
Versioned: the prior CURRENT (if any) is flipped to ARCHIVED with computed
change-notes; the incoming document becomes the new CURRENT. Re-sending an
unchanged spec is a no-op (returns `unchanged: true`).

parameters.name: removeUnlisted
parameters.description: Remove SDK_SYNC roles from unlisted principals

parameters.name: removeUnlisted
parameters.description: Remove API-sourced processes not in list

parameters.name: removeUnlisted
parameters.description: Remove SDK roles not in list

post.summary: Sync scheduled jobs for an application.
post.description:
Body specifies the target client (or null for platform-scoped). Caller
must have access to that client (or be anchor for platform-scoped).

parameters.name: removeUnlisted
parameters.description: Remove API-sourced subscriptions not in list

get.summary: List audit logs with filters (matches Java AuditLogAdminResource)

parameters.name: after
parameters.description:
Opaque cursor returned by a previous page's `nextCursor`. Omit for
the first page.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Filter by operation (Java calls this "operation", maps to action internally)

get.summary: Get audit logs for a specific entity
Get audit logs for a principal

post.description: Transitions a suspended or pending client to active status.
Deactivates/soft-deletes a client. Requires a reason.
Suspends a client (e.g., for billing issues). Requires a reason.

get.summary:
List dispatch jobs. Returns the most recent rows matching the filters;
no pagination — see `DispatchJobsQuery` for the rationale.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Free-text search across code, subject, source

post.description: Creates and queues a new dispatch job for webhook delivery.

get.summary: Get dispatch jobs for an event
Get filter options for dispatch jobs
get.description: Returns distinct values from the read projection for cascading filter dropdowns.

get.summary:
List raw dispatch jobs (from msg_dispatch_jobs, not the read projection).
Returns the most recent rows; no pagination — msg_dispatch_jobs ingests
at high rates and page navigation is meaningless.
Get all attempts for a dispatch job
get.description: Retrieves the full history of webhook delivery attempts for a job.

get.summary: Get raw dispatch job data by ID
get.description: Returns the full DispatchJob entity serialized directly as JSON (not the DTO).

post.summary: Add schema version to event type

get.summary:
List events. Returns the most recent rows matching the filters; no
pagination — see `EventsQuery` for the rationale.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Free-text search across type, source, subject

post.description:
Creates a new event in the event store. If a deduplicationId is provided and
an event with that ID already exists, the existing event is returned (idempotent operation).
Dispatch jobs are automatically created for matching subscriptions.

get.summary: Get filter options for the events read model.

List raw events (from msg_events, not the read projection). Returns the
most recent rows; no pagination — msg_events ingests at high rates and
page navigation through the firehose is meaningless.
Get pool statistics with enhanced metrics
Get OAuth client by client_id (public identifier)

post.summary: Rotate OAuth client secret (alias for regenerate-secret, matches TS API)

get.summary: Get application access for a principal
get.description: Returns all applications the principal has been granted access to.

put.summary: Set application access for a principal (batch replace)
put.description: Replaces all application access with the provided list.

get.summary: Get available applications for a principal
get.description:
ANCHOR users see all active applications.
CLIENT users see only applications enabled for their accessible client configs.

get.summary: Get client access grants for a principal

post.description: Resets the password for an internal auth user. Does not work for OIDC users.

400.description: User is not internal auth or invalid password

get.summary: Get roles assigned to a principal

put.summary: Batch assign roles to principal (declarative - replaces all roles)

post.summary: Trigger a password reset email for an internal-auth user.
post.description:
Sends the same single-use email as the user-initiated
`/auth/password-reset/request` flow. The user clicks the link and sets
their own password; the admin never sees or handles the password.

Rejects OIDC-federated users (they manage credentials at their IDP) and
users without an email address.

400.description: User is not eligible (OIDC, service account, or no email)

get.summary: Get roles by source (CODE, DATABASE, SDK)
Get applications for role filter dropdown
Get role by ID or name (code)
get.description:
The frontend calls this with the role name (e.g., "platform:super-admin"),
so we try by code first if it contains ":", otherwise by ID.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Filter by client. Pass the literal `platform` to filter platform-scoped.

get.description:
Determines how a user with the given email should authenticate:
- Internal: username/password
- OIDC: external identity provider

This is called before showing the login form to determine
if the user should be redirected to an external IDP.

post.description:
Authenticates a user with email and password credentials.
Returns an access token on success and sets a session cookie.
Invalidates the current session by clearing the session cookie.

get.description: Returns information about the currently authenticated user.

post.description:
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token.
The refresh token is rotated (old one invalidated, new one issued).

Returns a `PublicKeyCredentialRequestOptions` challenge. The response
shape is identical for known and unknown emails (deterministic-fake
`allowCredentials` is generated for unknown / federated / no-credentials
cases) — clients cannot distinguish them.

Validates the assertion, applies counter / backup-state updates,
re-checks the federation gate (hard cutover), and on success issues a
session cookie. All failure modes return 401 `INVALID_CREDENTIALS` with
an identical shape to defeat enumeration.

delete.summary: Revoke one of the caller's passkeys

404.description: Credential not found or not owned by caller

post.description:
Returns a WebAuthn `PublicKeyCredentialCreationOptions` challenge. The
browser passes this to `navigator.credentials.create()` and posts the
result to `/auth/webauthn/register/complete`.

400.description: Domain is federated or email malformed

post.description: Validates the browser's attestation response and stores the credential.

400.description: Ceremony state expired or attestation invalid

403.description: Ceremony belongs to a different principal

AuditLogDetailResponse.description: Audit log detail response (includes operation JSON)

AuditLogListResponse.description:
Cursor-paginated audit logs response. `aud_logs` grows unbounded, so we
keyset-paginate on `(performed_at, id) DESC` and never count.

AuditLogResponse.description: Audit log response DTO (matches Java AuditLogDto)

AuthenticateBeginResponse.description:
WebAuthn authentication challenge to hand to `navigator.credentials.get()`.
The shape is identical for known and unknown emails — see the enumeration
defence note in the source.

BatchAssignRolesRequest.description: Batch assign roles request (for PUT /roles - declarative update)

roles.description: List of role codes to assign (replaces existing roles)

BatchAssignRolesResponse.description: Batch assign roles response (matches Java RolesAssignedResponse)

count.description: Total number of events in response

dispatchJobCount.description: Number of dispatch jobs created for matching subscriptions

duplicateCount.description: Number of events that were deduplicated (already existed)

CheckEmailDomainResponse.description: Check email domain response (matches Java EmailDomainCheckResponse)

allowedClientIds.description:
When the user must pick a client, this is the allow-list to choose
from. Empty when `requiresClientId` is false (no input needed) OR
when there is no per-domain restriction (any active client is valid —
the UI shows the full list it already fetches).

derivedScope.description:
Scope the user will be created with (ANCHOR / PARTNER / CLIENT).
Derived from anchor domains + email_domain_mappings; unmapped domains
default to CLIENT.

hasAuthConfig.description: Whether this domain has auth configuration

isAnchorDomain.description: Whether this is an anchor domain

requiresClientId.description:
True when the create-user form must supply a `clientId`. False for
anchor domains and for mappings that already pin a primary client.

ClientAccessGrantResponse.description: Client access grant response (matches Java ClientAccessGrantDto)

ClientApplicationResponse.description: Client application config response (matches Java ClientApplicationDto)

active.description: Whether the application itself is active globally

enabledForClient.description: Whether this application is enabled for this specific client

CreateDispatchJobRequest.description: Request to create a new dispatch job

code.description: The event type or task code

dataOnly.description: If true, send raw payload only

eventId.description: Source event ID (required for EVENT kind)

kind.description: The kind of dispatch job (EVENT or TASK)

subscriptionId.description: Subscription ID that created this job

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for HTTP call

causationId.description: Causation ID - the event that caused this event

clientId.description: Client ID (optional, defaults to caller's client)

CreateEventResponse.description: Create event response - includes deduplication info and dispatch job count

dispatchJobCount.description: Number of dispatch jobs created for matching subscriptions

isDuplicate.description: True if this was a deduplicated request (event already existed)

applicationIds.description: Application IDs this client can access

clientId.description: OAuth client_id (public identifier). Auto-generated if not provided.

postLogoutRedirectUris.description: Allowed post-logout redirect URIs (OIDC RP-Initiated Logout)

CreateOAuthClientResponse.description:
Wrapper response from `POST /api/oauth-clients`. Includes the freshly
generated `client_secret` exactly once for confidential clients — it is
never retrievable afterwards.

clientSecret.description:
Plaintext client secret. Only present on creation of CONFIDENTIAL
clients. Capture this on the first response — the platform stores
only the encrypted form and cannot return it again.

applicationCode.description: Application code this role belongs to

clientManaged.description: Whether clients can manage this role

roleName.description: Role name (will be combined with app code to form code)

dispatchPoolId.description: Dispatch pool ID for rate limiting

enforcePasswordComplexity.description:
When false, the platform skips its password complexity rules
(uppercase/lowercase/digit/special) and only enforces a 2-character
minimum. Intended for SDK callers that apply their own policy.
Defaults to true.

password.description: Password (optional - only for internal auth users)

DashboardMetrics.description:
Dashboard metrics response.

`total_events` and `total_jobs` are **approximate** — read from
`pg_class.reltuples` (the planner's row estimate maintained by autovacuum/
ANALYZE). Within a few % of accurate; sub-millisecond regardless of row
count, where exact counts on `msg_events` / `msg_dispatch_jobs` would be a
non-starter at production scale.

`jobs_by_status` was removed: migration 015 dropped the status index on
`msg_dispatch_jobs` (it's a write-optimized table; the read projection
has the index). Per-status counts are now full table scans, so they're
not surfaced here. If you need them, query the read projection directly.

eventsLastHour.description:
Events in last hour. Currently always 0 — needs a time-windowed
counter on the projection or an external metrics store.

DispatchJobFilterOptionsResponse.description:
Filter options for dispatch jobs dropdowns — cascading filter support.
Matches the TS version: queries distinct values from the read projection.

DispatchJobReadResponse.description: Dispatch job read projection response (matches Java DispatchJobReadResponse)

DispatchJobResponse.description: Dispatch job response DTO (matches Java DispatchJobReadResponse)

providerId.description: Provider ID if external IDP is required

EnhancedPoolMetrics.description: Enhanced metrics for a processing pool

message.description: Human-readable error message suitable for display

EventFilterOptions.description:
Filter options for the events read model (cascading filters).
Clients are served by the canonical `/bff/filter-options/clients` endpoint,
so they aren't duplicated here.

EventRead.description: Event read projection — CQRS read model, matches msg_events_read table

EventSummaryResponse.description: Event summary for list endpoints (no payload data)

EventTypeListResponse.description: Event type list response (matches Java BffEventTypeListResponse)

EventTypeResponse.description: Event type response DTO (matches Java BffEventTypeResponse)

EventsFilterOptions.description: Events filter options response (for events list page)

FilterOption.description: A filter option with value and label (matches TS FilterOption)

clientId.description: Client ID to grant access to

LoginResponse.description: Login response - matches Java LoginResponse record

hasActiveInstance.description: Computed: true if any non-terminal instance currently exists.

size.description: Page size. Aliases: limit, pageSize, page_size.

oneOf.description: Enhanced metrics (optional, available when metrics collection is enabled)

aggregateSuccessRate.description: Aggregate success rate across all pools

isAnchorUser.description: Whether user is an anchor domain user

clientSecret.description: The new plaintext client secret (shown once)

RegisterBeginRequest.description: Optional metadata for a passkey registration ceremony.

displayName.description: Display name shown in the authenticator UI (defaults to the user's name).

RegisterBeginResponse.description: WebAuthn registration challenge to hand to `navigator.credentials.create()`.

stateId.description: Opaque ceremony state token; pass back unchanged on `register/complete`.

RegisterCompleteRequest.description: Browser's registration response, plus the ceremony state token.

enforcePasswordComplexity.description:
When false, the platform skips its password complexity rules
(uppercase/lowercase/digit/special) and only enforces a 2-character
minimum. Intended for SDK callers that apply their own policy.
Defaults to true.

RoleAssignmentDto.description: Role assignment DTO (matches Java RoleAssignmentDto for GET /roles)

hasActiveInstance.description: Computed: true if any non-terminal instance currently exists.

applicationIds.description: Application IDs to grant access to (replaces existing)

version.description: Version string (converted from u32 to "X.0" format for frontend compatibility)

isLeader.description: Whether this instance is the leader

SyncDispatchPoolInputRequest.description: A single dispatch pool input for sync

SyncEventTypeInputRequest.description: A single event type input for sync

SyncOpenApiSpecRequest.description:
Request body for syncing an application's OpenAPI document.
The spec is accepted as a raw JSON value; the platform reads `info.version`
to track versions and computes a diff against the prior CURRENT to populate
human-readable change notes.

SyncPrincipalInputRequest.description: A single principal input for sync

active.description: Whether the user is active (default: true)

email.description: User's email address (unique identifier for matching)

roles.description: Role short names to assign (prefixed with applicationCode)

SyncProcessInputRequest.description: A single process input for sync

SyncResultResponse.description: Sync result response (shared across all sync endpoints)

SyncRoleInputRequest.description: A single role input for sync

SyncSubscriptionEventTypeRequest.description: Event type binding for sync subscription input

SyncSubscriptionInputRequest.description: A single subscription input for sync

enabledApplicationIds.description: List of application IDs to enable

applicationIds.description: Application IDs this client can access

postLogoutRedirectUris.description: Allowed post-logout redirect URIs (OIDC RP-Initiated Logout)

clientId.description:
Home client ID (required when scope is CLIENT, ignored otherwise).
Changing client requires anchor.

scope.description: User scope (ANCHOR / PARTNER / CLIENT). Changing scope requires anchor.

clientManaged.description: Whether clients can manage this role

permissions.description: Replace the role's permission set. Omit to leave permissions unchanged.

processingTime.description: Processing time metrics for this window

rateLimitedCount.description: Messages rate limited in this window

successCount.description: Messages processed successfully in this window
